title: Klaviyo vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Moosend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool fits your business needs.
intro: Klaviyo and Moosend are both popular email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they cater to different business types. Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation with advanced analytics, while Moosend focuses on affordability and unlimited email sending. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need deep product analytics
You want advanced segmentation and SMS capabilities alongside email marketing
You prioritize predictive analytics and customer behavior insights for your campaigns
choose_b_if: You're a small business with a tight budget and need email marketing starting at $9/month
You want unlimited email sending without worrying about volume-based pricing
You need landing pages, subscription forms, and basic automation without complexity

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce businesses needing sophisticated automation and analytics, with a higher G2 rating (4.6 vs 4.7) and strong Trustpilot score (3.8). Moosend wins on price and simplicity, making it better for small businesses and beginners seeking affordable email marketing.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at just $9/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Moosend's free tier also includes 1,000 subscribers versus Klaviyo's 500, making it the clear choice for budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms support contact list exports and imports. Both tools allow you to export your subscriber data, which you can then import into Klaviyo. Check with both platforms' support teams for detailed migration guides to ensure a smooth transition.
